description: Perform a Confirmatory Factor Analysis (CFA) on the Big Five personality items using the dataset at /home/ga/Documents/JASP/BigFivePersonalityTraits.csv. Model the 25 items across five factors: Agreeableness (A1-A5), Conscientiousness (C1-C5), Extraversion (E1-E5), Neuroticism (N1-N5), and Openness (O1-O5). The analysis must include standardized estimates and model fit indices (CFI, TLI, RMSEA, and SRMR). Save the project to /home/ga/Documents/JASP/CFA_BigFive.jasp and create a report at /home/ga/Documents/JASP/CFA_BigFive_Report.txt containing the Model Chi-square, CFI, RMSEA, and SRMR values.
